meaning: severely subnormal 智力严重逊常
examples: Iterate until you find the one you want (the SSN attribute).
What happens to the older instances that weren't created with an SSN? Nothing.
Use the algorithm that generates a Random SSN with a valid source area number (first 3 digits).
You generally need a Social Security Number (SSN) to claim a dependent on your federal income tax return.
Identity thieves typically file early in the tax filing season, well in advance of the true owner of the SSN.
